sections.sectionTitle: Milim A Haihuaina leh Topa Muan'na

verses.text: Kote tungah hiloin, Topa aw, kote tungah hiloin, na itna kip leh na thumanna hangin nangma tungah minthan'na om ta hen
Bang hangin minam dangte in, “Amaute' Pasian koi-ah om ahi hiam?” ci laizang ding ahi uh hiam
Vantungah eite' Pasian om a, ama ut peuhpeuh a hih hi
Amau' milimte pen ngun leh kham hi lel a, mihingte' khut tawh a kibawl ahi hi
Amaute in kam nei napi-in pau theilo uh a, mit nei napi-in khua mu theilo uh hi
Amaute in bil nei napi-in khua zalo uh a, nak nei napi-in a nam theilo uh hi
Amaute in khut nei napi-in lawng theilo uh a, khe nei napi-in pai theilo uh hi. Amaute in aw gingsak theilo uh hi
Tuate a bawlte leh tuate a muangte khempeuh pen tuate mah tawh kibang uh hi
Israel-te aw, Topa muang un. Amah pen note hong huhpa leh hong hupa ahi hi
Aaron innkuante aw, Topa muang un. Amah pen note hong huhpa leh hong hupa ahi hi
Topa a zahtakte aw, Topa muang un. Amah pen note hong huhpa leh hong hupa ahi hi
Topa in eite hong phawk a, thupha hong pia ding hi. Amah in Israel mite, thupha hong pia ding a, amah in Aaron innkuante thupha hong pia ding hi
Amah in Topa a zahtakte a lian a neu-in thupha hong pia ding hi
Topa in note leh na tate uh hong pungsak ta hen
Van leh lei a bawl Topa in note thupha hong pia ta hen
Vantung pen Topa-a' hi a, ahih hangin leitung pen mihingte tungah hong pia khin hi
Misite ahi a, gamdaihna sungah a pai peuhpeuhte in ahi zongin Topa phatlo uh hi
Ahih hangin eite in tu-a kipanin a tawntungin Topa i phat ngitnget ding hi. Topa phat un.
